titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 53: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 53. (A.R. No. 345 of 1903.) NAṄGĀVARAM, KULITTALAI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the base of the central shrine in the Piḍāri temple.

Records that 12(1/2) kalam of paddy per annum accrued by way of interest at the rate of two nāḻi per kalam per month, on the fifty kalam of paddy gifted by an individual named •••• teḍakki ulagaṉ (apparently for providing offerings and worship) to the goddess Araṇaḻippa Mākāḷattukkāḷa-bhaṭāri alias Sāttaṉūr Naṅgai for the prevalence of peace, prosperity and well-being of Ariñjigaich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a dēvadāna-brahmadēya on the southern bank (of the Kāvēri).
Published in S.I.I. Vol. VIII No. 654.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matiraikoṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu teṉkarai tevatā
ṉappiramateyam Aṟiñcikaiccaturvvedi maṅkalamāṉa I
grāmattukku sarvvaśān
tikaramāy sarvvābhyudaya samraddhyartthamāka Iruntaruḷi Irunta Araṇaḻi
ppa mākāḷattuk kāḷābhaṭāriyāṉa cāttaṉūr naṅkaikku vaṭakarai
teṭakki Ulakan vaitta nel Aimpatin kalam kalattuvāyt tiṅkaḷ Irunāḻi palicai
yāl Āṭṭu pannirukala varai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 53 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
